'''Ossel II''' was the [[Swamp/Legends|swampy]], high-[[Gravity/Legends|gravity]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Ossan]]s, in [[Western Reaches/Legends|Western Reaches]] and the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. Its main export was [[syp]] wood, though traders trying to purchase syp wood from Ossans were often required to take Ossans on as part of their crew. Many Ossans ended up slaves on [[Karfeddion/Legends|Karfeddion]].

{{Planet-stub}}
